title: Connect to Tableau Server Workbook Fields via GraphQL API
story: As a data analyst, I want to browse Tableau Server workbook dashboards and sheets with their measures, dimensions, formulas, data sources, and filters, so that I can understand and import metric definitions into the Metrics Glossary.
description:
Use the Tableau GraphQL API to navigate workbook → dashboard → sheet hierarchy and extract field-level metadata including measures, dimensions, formulas, filters, and data sources.

### GraphQL Query
Retrieves workbooks with dashboards, sheets, worksheetFields (role, semanticRole, aggregation, formula), datasourceFields, and upstreamDatasources.

### Vision
Package sheet/dashboard field data into JSON for Metrics Analyst analysis. The goal is to enable metric discovery from Tableau content and merge into the Metrics Glossary.

### Scope Decisions
- Dashboard detail shows all fields across sheets with sheet name filtering
- No third-level drill-down into individual sheet fields
- Need to distinguish admin dashboard templates from actual dashboards
- Need to extract datasources at the sheet level
acceptance_criteria: Workbooks, dashboards, and sheets are navigable via the UI
Sheet-level fields show measures, dimensions, formulas, filters, and data sources
GraphQL API integration retrieves complete field metadata
Dashboard view aggregates fields across all child sheets
Data can be packaged for Metrics Analyst analysis
ux_changes: New Tableau workbook/dashboard/sheet browser with field-level detail sidebar showing measures, dimensions, formulas, and data sources.
middleware_changes: Tableau GraphQL API integration for workbook, dashboard, sheet, and field metadata retrieval.
data_model_changes: Storage for Tableau workbook hierarchy and field metadata.
api_changes: Tableau GraphQL API queries for workbook/dashboard/sheet/field data.
implementation_notes: Developer needed Tableau access (licensing issue). GraphQL query fetches full hierarchy from workbooks down to datasourceFields. ChatGPT recommended for constructing complex GraphQL queries. Personal Access Token needed for API authentication.
comment_summary: Developer had Tableau licensing issues. After resolving, implemented the GraphQL integration showing workbooks, dashboards, sheets, and fields. Discussions about scope: no third-level drill-down, sheet-level datasource extraction, and distinguishing admin templates from dashboards.
